Item.title: Item
Item.description: An inventory item in Swamidatta Traders' database tracking wholesale and retail details.

item_id.description: Unique catalog ID for the inventory item.

category.description: Product category (e.g., Disposables, Mangal Puja Samagri, Party Decoration Articles).

purchase_price.description: Wholesale supplier cost price per unit.

selling_price_retail.description: Selling price for standard retail customers.

selling_price_wholesale.description: Selling price for bulk wholesale customers.

current_stock_qty.description: Available stock level in the warehouse.

min_stock_alert.description: Minimum stock threshold below which an alert is raised.

Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: A customer invoice document logging a wholesale or retail transaction.

date.description: Timestamp when the transaction was completed.

customer_type.description: Customer type determining unit pricing defaults.

items_sold.description: List of items purchased in this invoice.

gross_total.description: Sum of all line items before discount.

discount_given.description: Cash discount deducted from the gross total.

payment_mode.description: Payment channel used (e.g., Cash, UPI, Card, Credit).

WarehouseInward.title: WarehouseInward
WarehouseInward.description: A log of incoming supplier shipments restocking inventory levels.

items_received.description: List of restocked line items with counts.

total_invoice_cost.description: Total financial expense for the restock shipment.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Operating expenditure logging outward shop operating costs.

category.description: Expense category (e.g., Freight, Utilities, Rent, Staff Welfare).

remarks.description: Audit notes detailing the payment purpose.

/items/{itemId}.description: Inventory catalog and stock status entries.

/sales/{saleId}.description: Transaction invoice documents and sales counter lines.
